title: SATC 125mm Sanding Discs 72Pcs Orbital Sander Discs Hook and Loop 125mm Sanding Pads for Random Orbital Sander, 40 60 80 120 180 240 320 Grits Sanding Discs
features: 【All Purpose Package】 This pack of 72 sanding discs includes 12PCS of 40 Grit and 10PCS of 60/80/120/180/240/320 Grit. It is designed to meet all your needs and fit for different jobs, from grinding, deburring, blending, sanding, polishing, finishing to derusting

【Great Quality & Sticks Well】SATC sander pads are coated with premium aluminum oxide grains which give our product excellent performance and longer service life. Durable Velcro back can sticks well with on hassle on your random orbital sander.

【User Friendly】With velcro back, sanding discs 125mm hook and loop can be easily attached to your random orbital sander and replaced when worn up. Try to increase your work efficiency by using our hook and loop sanding discs

【Fits Great】Our sanding discs for electric sander are compatiable with all of the 125mm ramdom orbital sanders available on the market. And it is perfect for smaller jobs but also can be used on big jobs

【Wide Application】Our assorted grit sandpapers can work on a wide range of surfaces. They are recommended to work on wood/metal parts and surfaces, but they can also be used on non-metal surfaces and handle a variety of abrasives, in particular, grinding, deburring, polishing and derusting
